name: One-Dish Macaroni and Cheese with Sausage
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Polish sausage, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. If needed, prepare macaroni and cheese as directed on package.
3. Cook broccoli as directed on package; drain.
4. Combine broccoli, macaroni and cheese, and sausage in a 1 1/2-quart casserole.
5. In a small pot, melt margarine over low heat and stir in crushed crackers.
6. Sprinkle cracker mixture over top of casserole.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-30 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
410 Calories, 29 g Fat, 1160 mg Sodium
